system.notes:
Sleazy Lawyer, New Money

He firmly believes those who are wealthy should not be pestered with the law. No matter what you do, if you have means you can arrange for an alternate story that favors you. Deaths, frauds, robberies, and other crimes can be reduced to a few fines. He throws money at problems until they disappear.

He routinely hires outsiders to destroy evidence, intimidate witnesses, compel confessions, and so forth. He has countless enemies, both those seeking justice and former clients who ran out of money.
